output_debit_classifier.reason: Target has made a binding commitment to donate $1,000,000 to a humanitarian food aid program. When a donation is pledged and formalized through a promissory note, the expense is recognized immediately (the commitment creates a present obligation). The promissory note represents a formal liability that will be settled in 1 month. The transaction records the expense recognition and the corresponding liability creation.
